case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. MARTHA TENNEY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. SERVED JUL-26-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TENNEY, MARTHA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT TENNEY, MARTHA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT TENNEY, MARTHA
DECLARATION RE: COMPIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B) (2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TENNEY, MARTHA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENNEY, MARTHA $2,443.42 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,679.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
